format_constraints: Exactly one 'label: value' field per line.
Labels must appear in publish_index_field_order exactly.
The publish index ends with exactly one trailing newline.
No unknown files in the public witness bundle.

value_constraints.authority-root-sha256: SHA-256 of authority-root.txt; must equal the committed release anchor digest
value_constraints.release-authority-group-public-key: 33-byte compressed SEC1 release quorum key encoded as 66 lowercase hex characters

required_checks: public bundle has exactly the public profile files
manifest.txt equals assembly manifest-file output for wuci-ji.self.wj
warrant-message.txt equals assembly warrant-message-file release output for wuci-ji.self.wj
receipt-contract.txt is canonical and matches release-receipt.json
authority-root.txt is canonical and matches the committed release anchor digest
authority-root.txt allows release and does not allow open, trust, or publish
authority group-public-key equals receipt contract group-public-key
publish-index.txt hashes match the public bundle files
attestation.json matches the observed bundle state
non_goals: Do not include artifact.key in the public witness bundle.
Do not include an opened binary in the public witness bundle.
Do not include transcript material in the public witness bundle.
Do not open the artifact during witness verification.
Do not accept arbitrary signer material.
Do not accept trust or publish authority bits yet.
